note: Archive/Wiedijk100Theorems/Konigsberg.lean:75 — theorem not_isEulerian proves the Königsberg bridge graph (7 bridges, 4 landmasses) has no Eulerian trail; this IS the Seven Bridges of Königsberg result.
Mathlib/Data/Complex/Basic.lean:34 — structure Complex : Type where re : ℝ; im : ℝ. The complex plane IS the set of complex numbers ℂ = Complex.

Mathlib/Geometry/Polygon/Basic.lean:27 — structure Polygon (P) (n) has vertices : Fin n → P with no convexity requirement; a convex polygon is a special (unformalized) case of this general n-gon structure.

Mathlib/NumberTheory/Fermat.lean:33 defines fermatNumber n = 2^(2^n)+1 and :127 (pepin_primality) gives a primality test for it, but no named predicate for 'Fermat number that is prime' exists — nearby building blocks, not the concept itself.

Mathlib/Probability/Moments/Basic.lean:62 — centralMoment X p μ is the general p-th central moment; skewness is the normalized 3rd central moment (centralMoment X 3 μ / variance^(3/2)), which itself is not formalized.
